mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upload_parts (upload_session_id, part_number, part_size, etag, checksum, status, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{uploadSessionId}, #{partNumber}, #{partSize}, #{etag}, #{checksum}, #{status}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE part_size = VALUES(part_size), etag = VALUES(etag), checksum = VALUES(checksum), status = VALUES(status), uploaded_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, upload_session_id, part_number, part_size, etag, checksum, status, uploaded_at FROM upload_parts WHERE upload_session_id = #{uploadSessionId} ORDER BY part_number ASC
